calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-20-2021 Off Calendar

Plaintiffs Request And Motion For Prove Up Hearing Filed In Support Of Application For Default Judgment Against Defendant Krista Cagney
Off Calendar Apr-27-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for further Default Prove-Up Hearing as to defendant Krista Cagney, an individual.
Dept. 514. Judge: Murlene J. Randle. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Reporter: Giselle Casey, CSR #8098. Telephone: 415-551-3680. Email: gcasey@sftc.org.

David P. Wasserman, Esq. appeared with plaintiff Sophie Pappas, doing business as Sole Property Management, and for plaintiff Peter Pappas, doing business as Sole Property Management, who was not present.
Plaintiff Sophie Pappas as placed under oath and testified.
Both Mr. Wasserman and Ms. Pappas appeared via ZOOM for this morning's proceedings.
No appearance by defendant Krista Cagney, an individual.

Plaintiff's Complaint for Breach of Contract and Negligence was filed on September 16, 2020, and personally served on defendant Krista Cagney, an individual, on October 15, 2020.
Default as to defendant Krista Cagney, an individual, was entered on November 19, 2020.
DOE defendants were dismissed on December 3, 2020.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of plaintiffs Peter Pappas and Sophie Pappas, doing business as Sole Property Management, and against the defaulted defendant Krista Cagney, an individual, as follows:

Damages/Principal - $122,787.50.
Costs - $560.00.

Total - $123,347.50.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
